tool_use.param: [{'content': 'Implement branch checkout in connect_cmd.py', 'status': 'completed', 'active...[truncated 290 chars]...g tests'}, {'content': 'Submit PR', 'status': 'completed', 'activeForm': 'Submitting PR'}]

session.tool_result: Todos have been modified successfully. Ensure that you continue to use the todo list to track your progress. Please proceed with the current tasks if applicable
session.assistant:
Plan #8900 implemented and PR submitted: https://github.com/dagster-io/erk/pull/8900
**Summary of changes:**
**`src/erk/cli/commands/codespace/connect_cmd.py`** — After resolving the codespace, the command now checks the local branch via `ctx.git.branch.get_current_branch()`. If a branch is found (not detached HEAD, not outside a repo), it prepends `git fetch origin <branch> && git checkout <branch> &&` to the remote command string. This works for both the default Claude-launch path and the `--shell` path. The `NoRepoSentinel` guard ensures existing tests (which don't provide a repo context) continue to work.
**`tests/unit/cli/commands/codespace/test_connect_cmd.py`** — Added 3 new tests: - `test_connect_checks_out_local_branch` — verifies fetch+checkout appears in the remote command - `test_connect_skips_checkout_when_detached_head` — verifies no checkout when branch is `None` - `test_connect_shell_checks_out_local_branch` — verifies checkout appears in `--shell` mode
All 5,979 tests pass across all packages. CI fully green.
